description: Stage 1 machine-readable schema contract for normalized Command Doctor learning metadata.

command_learning_record.identity_rule: vendor_id + canonical_command_id is the stable mastery identity; aliases must not create separate mastery identities.

rule_summary: explanation_only commands may award concept, syntax, and limited command selection only
output_simulation commands may award concept, syntax, prediction, output interpretation, and command selection when evidence exists
simplified_state_simulation commands may award practical, troubleshooting, and verification only when the route and handler are explicit
full_state_simulation commands may award practical execution and verification only when runtime evidence and policy prove the result
safety requires a measurable safety decision

review_policy.rule: Stage 1 defines review eligibility only; it does not create student review records or change Home review counts.
